title: Reach out
body: A short call or message to understand what's bothering you and book a slot that suits.

title: Examine
body: Digital X-rays, intra-oral photographs and a 30-minute conversation — never rushed.

title: Plan
body: An itemised treatment plan with options, timelines and pricing emailed to you the same day.

title: Treat & review
body: Treatment in calm, paced sittings with structured follow-ups — and a quiet aftercare plan.
